auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Vin.ID account
auth.signupSubtitle: Start building your vehicle's digital identity
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.generic: We couldn't complete that request. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: This is your Vin.ID home. Your vehicles and records will appear here.
dashboard.emptyBody: Once vehicles are added, you'll see their digital identity and history here.

empty.title: No vehicles yet
empty.body: Add your first vehicle to start building its digital identity and history.

new.title: Add vehicle
new.subtitle: Enter the basic details. You can add history and documents later.

archive.title: Archive this vehicle?
archive.description: The vehicle and its history are kept, but it moves to your archived list. You can still view it later.

notFound.title: Vehicle not found
notFound.body: This vehicle doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save the vehicle. Please try again.
errors.archiveFailed: We couldn't archive the vehicle. Please try again.

maintenance.title: Maintenance

empty.title: No maintenance yet
empty.body: Add a service record to start building this vehicle's maintenance history.

maintenance.trustHelp: Trust labels describe how this record was created or supported. They do not certify the vehicle condition.

new.title: Add maintenance
new.subtitle: Record a service or repair for this vehicle.

delete.title: Remove from active history?
delete.description: This record is hidden from the active history but is not permanently deleted.

errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save this record. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: We couldn't remove this record. Please try again.

issues.title: Issues

empty.title: No issues yet
empty.body: Log an issue to keep track of symptoms and how they were handled.

fields.symptomsPlaceholder: Describe what you noticed (sounds, warning lights, behavior)…
fields.resolutionNotesHelp: Optional. What was done, or the outcome.

severityHelp.info: Informational — no action needed right now.
severityHelp.monitor: Keep watching and note any changes.
severityHelp.diy_simple: Looks like a simple DIY check.
severityHelp.mechanic_recommended: Consider booking a mechanic to look into it.
severityHelp.urgent: Consider handling soon and avoiding unnecessary driving.
severityHelp.stop_immediately: Possible safety risk — consider not continuing to drive.

issues.trustHelp: Trust labels describe how this issue record was created or supported. They do not certify the vehicle condition.

new.title: Add issue
new.subtitle: Log a symptom or problem you noticed with this vehicle.

resolve.title: Mark issue as resolved?
resolve.description: You can add an optional note about how it was handled.
resolve.notesPlaceholder: What was done, or the outcome…

delete.title: Remove from active issue history?
delete.description: This issue is hidden from the active issue history but is not permanently deleted.

errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save this issue. Please try again.
errors.resolveFailed: We couldn't resolve this issue. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: We couldn't remove this issue. Please try again.

documents.title: Documents
documents.privacyWarning: This document may contain personal information. Review it carefully before sharing it in a Vehicle Passport.
documents.trustHelp: Trust labels describe how this document record was created or supported. They do not certify the vehicle condition.

empty.title: No documents yet
empty.body: Upload a registration, insurance, invoice or inspection file to keep it with this vehicle.

fields.fileHelp: PDF, JPG, PNG or WebP. Up to 5 MB.
fields.containsPersonalInfo: This document may contain personal information
fields.shareAllowed: Allow sharing in a Vehicle Passport

preview.title: File
preview.expires: This secure link expires after a few minutes.

ai.help: AI extraction will be added later. Extracted fields will require your confirmation before saving.

new.title: Upload document
new.subtitle: Add a file and its details. Files are stored privately.

delete.title: Remove from active documents?
delete.description: This document is hidden from the active documents but is not permanently deleted. The file remains in private storage.

errors.fileRequired: Please choose a file to upload.
errors.invalidFileType: Allowed types: PDF, JPG, PNG, WebP.
errors.fileTooLarge: The file is larger than 5 MB.
errors.uploadFailed: We couldn't upload the file. Please try again.
errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save this document. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: We couldn't remove this document. Please try again.
